silhouette_language: Simple faceted primitives, flat-shaded so each face reads as a solid color block; forms are communicated purely through silhouette and vertex-color blocking, never surface micro-detail.
vision_style_brief: Assets should read as clean low-poly stylization: bright, saturated flat colors with hard-edged shading transitions between faces, no visible texture grain or wear, no PBR sheen. NOT: photoreal materials, gradients within a single face, metallic highlights, fine surface noise.
anti_style: fine surface noise or texture grain
